metadata.description: B3 incident comms mission: open incident → draft customer-facing updates → founder review → publish → resolve → auto-draft postmortem. Triggered when oncall alert has customer_impacting:true, or via /incident open.
metadata.trigger: oncall_alert.customer_impacting == true  OR  /incident open Telegram command
metadata.product_scoping: product_id required; all rows scoped per-product

phases.description: Open the incident and record initial details.

steps.title: Open incident record
steps.description: Insert a row into incidents with severity, affected_components_json, and initial customer_impact_summary. Sets opened_at = now, resolved_at = NULL.

payload.cmd: echo 'Incident opened by B3 mission via SQL (handled by orchestrator)'

steps.tools_hint: DB insert into incidents table via init_db migration. Caller passes incident_id forward.

phases.description: Iterative customer comms: draft → founder review → publish. Repeat until resolved.

steps.title: Draft customer-facing status update
steps.description: Call incident/draft_update with the internal alert details. Redacts hostnames, stack traces, and PII. Returns draft text for founder review.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: incident/draft_update. Payload: incident_id, product_id, alert_details (dict), status_kind.

steps.title: Founder review of draft status update
steps.description: Emit a founder_action with the draft. Founder approves or requests revision. Blocker: do NOT publish without founder OK. NOTE: max 4hr SLA — if founder unavailable >4h, B6 crisis playbook escalation applies (TODO: wire SLA timer when B6 T3E lands).
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto posthook handler: incident_update_review. Surfaces founder_action to Telegram.

steps.title: Publish approved status update
steps.description: Call incident/publish_status with the founder-approved text. Inserts status_updates row, updates incidents.current_status_md, busts /status page cache.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: incident/publish_status. Payload: incident_id, product_id, body_md, status_kind, founder_action_id.

phases.description: Resolve the incident and auto-draft postmortem.

steps.title: Publish resolved status update
steps.description: Publish final status update with status_kind='resolved'. Sets incidents.resolved_at = now.
steps.tools_hint: Same as 2.publish but status_kind=resolved. Sets resolved_at on the incidents row.

steps.title: Auto-draft postmortem template
steps.description: Call incident/draft_postmortem. Writes a markdown template with the incident timeline, customer updates, and placeholder sections (root cause, contributing factors, action items). Emits a founder_action requesting publication within 7 days.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: incident/draft_postmortem. Payload: incident_id, product_id, workspace_path (optional), mission_id.

manual.description: Founder opens incident manually via Telegram.
